mapper.sql: id, user_id, parent_id, type, name, description, icon, sort_order
mapper.select: SELECT FROM category WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id IN (0, #{userId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (user_id, parent_id, type, name, description, icon, sort_order) VALUES (#{userId}, #{parentId}, #{type}, #{name}, #{description}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM category WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM record WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND user_id = #{userId}
